== Notes for [[Item:Q88593|Q88593]] ==

'''General Notes'''
Death: 588 B.C.
King of Macedonia Philip I Argaead was the son of King of Macedonia Argaeus I Argaead and Prothoe (?) .2,3,4 King of Macedonia, the Balkan Peninsula, 0640-0602 B.C.. He married Nikonoe (?) .4,5

Child of King of Macedonia Philip I Argaead and Nikonoe (?):– King of Macedonia Aeropus I Argaead+

# Roderick W. Stuart, Royalty for Commoners: The Complete Lineage of John of Gaunt, Son of Edward III, Kings of England, and Queen Philippa (.: ., 3rd Ed., 1998), 413-88.
# Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 413-89.
# Herodotus of Halicarnassus, The History of Herodotus (London and New York: MacMillan and Co., 1890).
# Michael Marcotte's Genealogy: Argead Chart, online.
# Chris Bennett's Egyptian Royal Genealogy Website, online,

--------------------
Filipo I Rey Macedonico Subió al trono en 640 AC al 640 AC

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per01306.htm#0

RESEARCH NOTES:
King of Macedonia

Ruled 621 - 588 BC, King of Macedonia

Ruled 621 - 588 BC, King of Macedonia

Ruled 621 - 588 BC, King of Macedonia

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
